views.name: RecipeCollectionView
views.purpose: Root NavigationStack view. 2-column LazyVGrid of recipe cards showing title, MealCategory badge, total time (prep+cook), difficulty dots, and star rating. Search bar at top filters by title and ingredients. Horizontal scrolling MealCategory filter chips below search. Long-press for quick actions (favorite, delete). Empty state with cookbook illustration and add prompt. Nav bar trailing button opens CookbookStatsView as sheet.

views.name: RecipeDetailView
views.purpose: Pushed from collection. Hero header with title, category/cuisine badges, difficulty, and time pills (prep|cook|total). Heart toggle and edit button in nav bar. Three sections: (1) Ingredients with servings adjuster stepper that scales quantities, each ingredient is a tappable checkbox row with strikethrough when checked for cooking mode. (2) Numbered instruction step cards with large readable text. (3) Notes section. Sticky bottom bar with 'I Made This!' button that increments cookCount with a brief celebration animation and shows total cook count.

views.name: RecipeEntrySheet
views.purpose: Modal sheet for add/edit. Sections: (1) Basic Info — title field, meal category picker, cuisine picker, difficulty picker. (2) Time & Servings — steppers for prep time (5-min increments), cook time (5-min increments), servings. (3) Ingredients — dynamic list with add/remove, each row is a text field for one ingredient like '2 cups flour', plus button adds new row. (4) Steps — dynamic numbered list with add/remove/reorder, each row is a text field for one instruction. (5) Extras — star rating (1-5 tappable stars), notes field, source URL field. Save validates title and at least one ingredient.

views.name: CookbookStatsView
views.purpose: Presented as sheet from nav bar button on collection view. Shows collection summary: total recipes, favorites count, total times cooked across all recipes in a horizontal stat card row. Most cooked top-3 recipes list with cook counts. Category breakdown as colored horizontal bars showing recipe count per MealCategory. Cuisine distribution as a simple ranked list. Average difficulty and average rating displays.

viewModelComputedProperties.name: filteredRecipes
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Recipes filtered by current searchText (matches title or any ingredient) and selectedCategory filter, sorted by date descending

viewModelComputedProperties.name: favoriteRecipes
viewModelComputedProperties.description: All recipes where isFavorite is true, sorted by rating descending

viewModelComputedProperties.name: totalCookCount
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Sum of cookCount across all recipes

viewModelComputedProperties.name: mostCookedRecipes
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Top 3 recipes by cookCount descending, filtered to cookCount >= 1

viewModelComputedProperties.name: recipeCountByCategory
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Count of recipes per MealCategory, sorted by count descending, for bar chart

viewModelComputedProperties.name: recipeCountByCuisine
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Count of recipes per CuisineType, sorted by count descending, for ranked list

viewModelComputedProperties.name: averageRating
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Mean rating across all recipes with rating > 0

viewModelComputedProperties.name: totalTimeForRecipe
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Helper: prepTimeMinutes + cookTimeMinutes for a given recipe

dailyGoal.description: Weekly home cooking goal — target number of recipes to cook per week

domainLogic.streakDefinition: A streak day is any calendar day where the user tapped 'I Made This!' on at least one recipe. Consecutive days form the streak. Streak resets after a missed day.
domainLogic.trendAnalysis: Track total cook count week-over-week. Monitor cuisine diversity: count unique cuisines cooked this month vs total cooks. Flag if one category exceeds 70% of collection with a 'Try something new!' suggestion.
insights: Most cooked recipe with total cook count
Cuisine diversity score: unique cuisines / total recipes as percentage
Category balance: which meal types are over/under-represented
